steps.name: Flight Precheck
steps.instructions: Create feature branch. Verify workspace is clean.

steps.name: Context Preflight
steps.instructions: Run rivet context --intent code and save the contract to context.json. Review workflow recommendations, deterministic knowledge, and completeness before writing code.
steps.evidence: context.json generated; 8/8 sources succeeded; no prior report (Python repo, scan modes N/A)

steps.name: Verify Contract
steps.instructions: Write MUST PASS, MUST FAIL, and Integration Points. Save to contract.md.
steps.evidence: contract.md written: 6 MUST PASS (MP-1..6) covering normative + degraded + no-regression paths, 8 MUST FAIL (MF-1..8) covering auth gates + path-confusion + method-confusion, 6 integration points enumerated, out-of-scope items called out (docs UI stays disabled, HMAC/IP not part of this slice).

steps.name: Spec/PRD
steps.instructions: Write specification and design document with measurable acceptance criteria. Save to spec.md and design.md.
steps.evidence: spec.md (problem, user-capability sentence per RC-15, 12 measurable acceptance criteria with check commands, non-goals) + design.md (PUBLIC_ENDPOINTS frozenset of (path,method) tuples, canonicalisation argument addressing MF-7 path-confusion, rejected alternatives documented, 7 new test cases enumerated, rollout + rollback plan)

steps.name: Adversarial Spec
steps.instructions: Attack spec with AS-001..AS-008. Save findings to as-findings.json.
steps.evidence: Adversarial spec loop: 2 iterations, 5 findings (1 Critical AS-005, 2 High AS-003/AS-002, 1 Medium AS-004, 1 Low AS-007), all resolved in iteration 2. Iteration 2 re-attack clean. as-findings.json written.

steps.name: Implement
steps.instructions: HUMAN REVIEW GATE: Review the spec, contract, and adversarial findings before proceeding. Run 'rivet sdd step --approve' to begin implementation.
steps.evidence: PUBLIC_ENDPOINTS frozenset of (path,method) tuples introduced; auth_mw rewritten with canonicalisation+exact-match. /openapi.json route registered with both GET and HEAD methods. 10 new tests + 2 updated tests. Test suite: 226/226 pass. Commit: 569f705.

steps.name: Doc Scaffolding
steps.instructions: Update or scaffold documentation for the configured target(s). Uncommitted .md changes on the mapped target path are required.

steps.name: Build + Test
steps.instructions: Run build and tests. Save results to build-result.json.

steps.name: Grade Contract
steps.instructions: Grade each MUST PASS/FAIL item. Save to contract-grade.json.
steps.evidence: contract-grade.json: 6/6 MUST PASS, 8/8 MUST FAIL, all evidenced by named tests, overall PASS

steps.name: Adversarial Verify
steps.instructions: CLI runs rivet verify --scope branch automatically. Triple adversarial required.
steps.evidence: 5 verify rounds, all findings addressed. Suite 229/229. R5 clean.
